description: Style Note Without compromising on comfort, make sure your little one looks cute and fresh in this tee from madagascar 3. Clothes in soothing pastel shades and soft fabric ensure that kids stay comfortable throughout the day. Product Description Pink T-shirt with short sleeves, has a round neckline, graphic print in front and press buttons over the left shoulder Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with like colours Dry immediately after wash Iron on reverse
